channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Madonna, Sabrina Carpenter Make Coachella History With Stunning ‘Vogue’ and ‘Like a Prayer’ Duets
item.description: 🎉🔥 Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter SLAY Coachella with iconic 'Vogue' and 'Like a Prayer' performances! Legends unite! 🙌✨ #Coachella #MusicHistory

item.title: Dylan Sprouse Holds Home Intruder at Gun Point
item.description: 🚨 Dylan Sprouse goes full superhero mode, keeping his castle safe! 😱🔫 #CelebrityNews #StaySafe

item.title: Tour news: Aziz Ansari, Murphy’s Law, David Cross, Uranium Club, Loser’s Lounge Plays Duran Duran, more
item.description: 🌟 Exciting tour updates ahead! 🎶 Get ready to rock with these music icons! 🎸 #TourNews #LiveMusicMondays

item.title: Beastie Boys Release To the Five Boroughs Deluxe Reissue
item.description: 🎉 Beastie Boys fans, get ready to groove with the deluxe reissue of To the Five Boroughs! Unleash those iconic beats! 🎶 #BeastieBoys #DeluxeEdition

item.title: Paul McCartney Reunites with Ringo Starr for Collaboration on His New Solo Album
item.description: 🚀 Beatles reunion alert! 🎸 Paul McCartney teams up with Ringo Starr for new solo album magic! 🌟 #LegendsCollide #MusicHistoryMade
